exercises.code:
# E2-Skeptic/S04-T3-A-E2: solo patrones del paquete activo
# Fixture del paquete (conserva datos; no reescribas asserts)
def tasa_reject(sts):
    n_total = len(sts)
    if n_total == 0:
        return None
    n_reject = sum(1 for s in sts if s == "reject")
    return n_reject / n_total
print(round(tasa_reject(["accept", "reject", "accept"]), 4))
exercises.justification_from_packet: E2-Skeptic: dudé del atajo y me ceñí al paquete E2 de la sección activa.
